info.title: Prime Self API
info.description: Programmatic access to Human Design chart calculations, profile generation, transit forecasts, and astrological insights. Perfect for developers, researchers, and businesses building HD-powered applications.

tags.name: Chart
tags.description: Calculate and retrieve Human Design charts

post.description: Generate a complete Human Design chart from birth data, including type, profile, authority, centers, gates, channels, astrology, and numerology.

get.description: Calculate major astrological life cycles for a chart (Saturn Return, Chiron Return, Uranus Opposition, etc.)
Retrieve detailed information about a specific Human Design gate, including name, center, circuit, lines, and Gene Key.

post.description: Create an AI-powered profile narrative from a Human Design chart. Customizable by section, audience, and length.
Retrieve current and upcoming planetary transits affecting a chart. Includes gate activations, channel formations, and astrological aspects.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key from primeself.app Settings > API Keys

julianDay.description: Julian Day Number for personality calculation

gates.description: Activated gate numbers in this center

channelFormed.description: Channel number if transit forms channel

value.message: Include X-API-Key header with your API key
The provided API key does not exist or has been revoked

example.message: The requested resource does not exist

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when rate limit resets

example.error: Rate limit exceeded. 1,000 requests per day. Resets in 3600 seconds.
example.upgrade: Upgrade to Pro tier for 10,000 requests/day
